name: HalalPulse personal multibagger research methodology
verification_note: REPLACE with a review record covering every factor definition, grade anchor, weight, valuation assumption, market-cap band, evidence rule, and microcap adjustment.

factors.label: Piotroski F-Score
factors.description: Nine-signal historical financial-strength review with the underlying statements retained as evidence.
evidence_requirements: Retain the financial statements used for every one of the nine signals.
Document each binary signal and reconcile the final F-Score to the retained statements.

grade_anchors.1: REPLACE with the strongest-evidence grade anchor.
grade_anchors.4: REPLACE with the above-average grade anchor.
grade_anchors.7: REPLACE with the weak-evidence grade anchor.
grade_anchors.10: REPLACE with the weakest or materially adverse grade anchor.

factors.label: Graham and DCF valuation
factors.description: Review both methods; label undervalued only when current price is no higher than both values.
evidence_requirements: Retain EPS, book value per share, current price, and their reporting dates.
Retain the complete DCF assumptions and reconcile the resulting per-share value.

grade_anchors.1: REPLACE with the strongest dual-valuation anchor.
grade_anchors.7: REPLACE with the expensive or assumption-sensitive anchor.
grade_anchors.10: REPLACE with the materially overvalued or unusable anchor.

factors.label: ROE and ROCE
factors.description: Review return on equity, return on capital employed, persistence, and capital intensity.
evidence_requirements: Retain at least the configured history of ROE and ROCE calculations.
Explain material differences between ROE and ROCE and any leverage or capital-intensity effect.

grade_anchors.1: REPLACE with the durable high-return anchor.
grade_anchors.4: REPLACE with the adequate and improving return anchor.
grade_anchors.7: REPLACE with the weak or volatile return anchor.
grade_anchors.10: REPLACE with the persistently poor return anchor.

factors.label: Revenue and profit growth
factors.description: Review at least three years when available, including CAGR, yearly consistency, and margin compression.
evidence_requirements: Retain yearly revenue and profit figures for the configured history period.
Document CAGR, negative years, base effects, acquisitions, and margin changes.

grade_anchors.1: REPLACE with the strong and consistent growth anchor.
grade_anchors.4: REPLACE with the positive but uneven growth anchor.
grade_anchors.7: REPLACE with the weak or low-quality growth anchor.
grade_anchors.10: REPLACE with the shrinking or unreliable growth anchor.

factors.label: Operating margin trend
factors.description: Review EBITDA margin level, direction, and negative-operating-profit risk.
evidence_requirements: Retain operating-profit and revenue evidence for each reviewed period.
Explain margin direction, cyclicality, exceptional items, and negative operating-profit periods.

grade_anchors.1: REPLACE with the high and improving margin anchor.
grade_anchors.4: REPLACE with the stable or moderately improving margin anchor.
grade_anchors.7: REPLACE with the compressed or volatile margin anchor.
grade_anchors.10: REPLACE with the structurally negative margin anchor.

factors.label: Debt quality
factors.description: Review debt-to-equity, interest coverage, debt direction, and available secured/unsecured composition.
evidence_requirements: Retain borrowings, finance cost, equity, and operating-profit evidence.
Document debt trend, interest coverage, repayment concentration, and disclosed security or covenant risk.

grade_anchors.1: REPLACE with the net-cash or exceptionally strong debt anchor.
grade_anchors.4: REPLACE with the manageable leverage anchor.
grade_anchors.7: REPLACE with the elevated leverage or weak coverage anchor.
grade_anchors.10: REPLACE with the distressed leverage anchor.

factors.label: Cash-flow quality
factors.description: Review operating cash flow versus profit, free cash flow, capital expenditure, and cash conversion.
evidence_requirements: Retain operating cash flow, profit, capital expenditure, and free-cash-flow evidence.
Explain recurring profit-to-cash divergence and major working-capital or capital-expenditure effects.

grade_anchors.1: REPLACE with the consistently strong cash-conversion anchor.
grade_anchors.4: REPLACE with the acceptable cash-conversion anchor.
grade_anchors.7: REPLACE with the weak or volatile cash-conversion anchor.
grade_anchors.10: REPLACE with the persistent negative cash-quality anchor.

factors.label: Working-capital efficiency
factors.description: Review current and quick ratios, debtor days, inventory days, and their trends.
evidence_requirements: Retain receivables, inventory, payables, current assets, and current liabilities for each reviewed period.
Document debtor, inventory, and payable-day trends and any material concentration or ageing concern.

grade_anchors.1: REPLACE with the efficient and improving working-capital anchor.
grade_anchors.4: REPLACE with the adequate working-capital anchor.
grade_anchors.7: REPLACE with the stretched or deteriorating anchor.
grade_anchors.10: REPLACE with the severe liquidity or collection-risk anchor.

factors.label: Promoter quality
factors.description: Review promoter holding and direction, pledge, dilution, and disclosed governance evidence.
evidence_requirements: Retain exchange disclosures for promoter holding, pledge, and dilution over the reviewed periods.
Document auditor, related-party, regulatory, or governance matters that affect the grade.

grade_anchors.1: REPLACE with the strong alignment and governance anchor.
grade_anchors.4: REPLACE with the acceptable governance anchor.
grade_anchors.7: REPLACE with the material concern anchor.
grade_anchors.10: REPLACE with the severe pledge, dilution, or governance-risk anchor.

factors.label: Institutional ownership trend
factors.description: Review FII and DII direction without penalizing an otherwise strong microcap solely for zero institutional ownership.
evidence_requirements: Retain quarterly shareholding-pattern disclosures for FII and DII ownership.
Explain changes, base effects, and why zero institutional ownership is or is not material for the company size.

grade_anchors.1: REPLACE with the strong and corroborated ownership-trend anchor.
grade_anchors.4: REPLACE with the neutral or moderately improving anchor.
grade_anchors.7: REPLACE with the declining or uncertain ownership anchor.
grade_anchors.10: REPLACE with the materially adverse ownership or disclosure anchor.

factors.label: Official macro tailwind
factors.description: Use PIB, SEBI, RBI, MCA, or Union Budget evidence only; do not use media or social posts.
evidence_requirements: Link a current approved government-tailwind review from an allowed official source.
Explain the transmission mechanism from the policy action to the company's sector and earnings capacity.

grade_anchors.1: REPLACE with the strong direct official-tailwind anchor.
grade_anchors.4: REPLACE with the moderate direct or strong indirect anchor.
grade_anchors.7: REPLACE with the weak, uncertain, or offsetting-policy anchor.
grade_anchors.10: REPLACE with the material official headwind anchor.

factors.label: Relative valuation ratios
factors.description: Review PE versus sector, price-to-book, EV/EBITDA, PEG, and data comparability.
evidence_requirements: Retain the company's valuation ratios, comparison set, dates, and calculation basis.
Document loss-making comparables, exceptional earnings, sector differences, and any non-comparable data.

grade_anchors.1: REPLACE with the compelling comparable-valuation anchor.
grade_anchors.4: REPLACE with the reasonable valuation anchor.
grade_anchors.7: REPLACE with the expensive or weakly comparable anchor.
grade_anchors.10: REPLACE with the extreme or unusable valuation anchor.

valuation_policy.graham_basis_note: REPLACE with the reviewed reason for using the configured Graham coefficient and the limitations of this calculation.
valuation_policy.dcf_review_note: REPLACE with the required DCF review discipline, scenario checks, and rules for rejecting unsupported assumptions.

market_cap_band_note: REPLACE with the reviewed rationale, intended use, and review date for these market-cap categories.
microcap_adjustment_note: REPLACE with the reviewed rationale for each red/green adjustment and the safeguards against double-counting factor risks.

red_flags.label: Auditor change, qualification, or quality concern
High related-party transactions, loans, or advances
Reported profit is not supported by cash

green_flags.label: Early-stage revenue with strong evidenced growth
Niche sector with evidenced entry barriers
